name: LLM-as-a-Judge Scores Are Unreliable Optimization Signals in Closed-Loop Table Recognition
summary: arXiv:2607.13347v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge is widely used to provide feedback and selection signals in closedloop regeneration, but this use remains insufficiently val...
description: arXiv:2607.13347v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: LLM-as-a-judge is widely used to provide feedback and selection signals in closedloop regeneration, but this use remains insufficiently validated. We study it in table recognition, where deterministic TEDS evaluation provides a controlled testbed, using FinTabNet and OmniDocBench. Three findings emerge. First, judge signals were weak on...
author: Donghwan Kim
